sheet_name: แปลนหลังคา
view_title: แปลนหลังคา
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01_หน้า08.png

element.grid_ref: covers grid1-3 x gridE-A plus overhangs, with a rectangular notch cut out at the south end (grid2-3 x gridB-A, matching the ground-floor จอดรถ carport, which is open/uncovered by this main roof)
element.description: หลังคาเหล็กรีดลอน (corrugated metal sheet roofing), hatched vertically over the whole roofed plan; two 'SLOPE 6°' labels printed vertically down the two roof faces (one each side of a central fold line running roughly north-south near grid2), indicating fall direction/pitch of approximately 6 degrees.
element.ridge_or_valley_lines: one internal fold line runs roughly north-south near grid2 (between the two 'SLOPE 6°' labels) — not confidently classified as a true ridge vs. valley at this resolution

element.grid_ref: beyond gridA at grid1-2 (over เฉลียง/ระเบียง below), level +6.65
element.description: 'กันสาด ค.ส.ล.' concrete canopy slab, floor-material box '5 +6.65 —' printed at the same location

warnings: This sheet (A-06) is the roof plan for the whole 2-story building — since the roof sits above the 2nd floor (+6.65 roof beam level), its footprint corresponds to the 2nd-floor plan (หน้า07/A-05), not the ground floor: the notch over the open carport (grid2-3 x gridB-A) matches the 2nd floor's 'แนวหลังคา' open void, not a ground-floor room shape.

The 'SLOPE 6°' labels are printed vertically along both roof faces, same convention and same 6-degree value as the sister houses' roof plans and consistent with the slope arrows shown on elevations 2 and 4 (หน้า10/หน้า12) — read at medium-high confidence given the small stylized text.

Actual roof framing (purlins/rafters/trusses) is not detailed on this sheet — references 'โครงหลังคา ดูแบบวิศวกรรมโครงสร้าง' (structural engineering drawings, outside this extraction's architecture-only page range 03-27), consistent with the section sheets (หน้า13-15) which show the same reference note.

Overhang dimensions (1.30m east/west, 1.50m north/south) exactly match the corresponding overhang figures independently read on the floor plan sheets (หน้า06/07) and elevation sheets (หน้า09-12) — cross-consistent, no dummy grid line required for any of them beyond the master's already-flagged 1'/3' dummy grids (those cover the 1.10m/0.50m built-bay extensions, which are separate from these roof overhangs).
